overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring high-speed traversal through a rain-soaked neon-lit dystopian city at night. The vehicle ascends elevated highways, passes a massive ferris wheel, and weaves through dense urban canyons with heavy holographic advertising.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway ramp with burning vehicle wreckage

events.description: vehicle accelerates from intersection onto elevated highway ramp
large ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance as vehicle climbs

agents.ego_description: accelerating up an elevated highway ramp while navigating around a burning vehicle wreck

notable_agents.action: burning wreckage stationary in the intersection

entered.detail: wrecked car with active flames in the middle of the intersection
tall building with large glowing holographic advertisements
curved asphalt ramp leading upward into the elevated highway system
massive illuminated amusement park ferris wheel visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy night intersection with a burning vehicle wreck. The player accelerates onto an elevated highway ramp, ascending into the neon-lit cityscape while a massive ferris wheel becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: high elevation highway overlook with ferris wheel view

events.description: vehicle reaches maximum elevation with panoramic city view below
passing alongside the ferris wheel at eye level before it recedes behind

agents.ego_description: speeding along high elevation highway with view of city lights below and ferris wheel alongside

entered.detail: dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers and high-rise buildings
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway structure

segments.scene_description: Driving at high elevation with the city sprawling below, the vehicle passes the massive ferris wheel at eye level before it recedes to the left. The highway stretches forward with support pillars and distant skyline visible through the rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding elevated highway descent with overpasses

events.description: vehicle begins descending winding ramp with sharp turns
exiting high elevation into lower highway corridor with billboard walls

agents.ego_description: navigating sharp turns while descending from high elevation highway toward lower city streets

notable_agents.action: distant car traveling on parallel road below

entered.detail: curved elevated roadway sloping downward with guardrails
covered tunnel section of the highway ahead
continuous walls of illuminated advertisements lining the highway

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends along winding elevated highways, navigating curves while the ferris wheel remains visible to the left. The environment transitions from open sky to a more enclosed corridor with billboard walls and approaching underpasses.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense neon urban canyon with holographic advertisements

events.description: entering narrow urban canyon with dense neon signage on both sides
passing through intensely lit neon corridor with magenta and cyan holograms

agents.ego_description: speeding through narrow neon-lit corridors between tall buildings with holographic ads

entered.detail: dense walls of glowing neon signs and holographic advertisements creating a canyon effect
covered section of highway with overhead structure blocking rain
tall building facades covered in digital displays and neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a dense urban canyon where towering walls of neon holograms and digital billboards create a tunnel-like effect. The lighting shifts to intense magenta and cyan as the car speeds through the narrow corridor under partial cover.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide multi-lane avenue with heavy neon advertising

events.description: exiting narrow canyon into wide open avenue with multiple lanes
approaching intersection with crosswalk and traffic signals visible

agents.ego_description: accelerating down wide avenue toward intersection, weaving between sparse traffic

notable_agents.action: car driving in same direction ahead on the multi-lane road

entered.detail: broad multi-lane street with clear lane markings stretching into the distance
crosswalk and traffic signals at the end of the avenue
high-rise buildings with illuminated windows lining both sides of the avenue

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow neon canyon, the vehicle enters a wide multi-lane avenue lined with skyscrapers and holographic advertisements. The player accelerates toward an intersection, navigating through sparse traffic as the city opens up ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous high-speed drive that begins at a chaotic street-level intersection and ascends into a neon-drenched urban canyon before opening into a wide city avenue. It begins by accelerating away from a burning vehicle wreck and climbing an elevated ramp, where a massive ferris wheel gradually emerges against the rainy night sky. As the vehicle reaches a high elevation, the camera glides past the ferris wheel at eye level before descending along winding highways that transition from open vistas to enclosed corridors of billboard walls. The scene then shifts into a dense urban canyon, where the lighting transforms into intense magenta and cyan as the car speeds through a tunnel of towering holographic advertisements. Finally, the vehicle bursts out of the narrow corridor and onto a wide multi-lane avenue, accelerating through sparse traffic toward a sprawling intersection of skyscrapers.
